message:
test: expand contract and integration test suites across four modules

Add approximately 2800 lines of new tests across four areas to
establish comprehensive contract coverage:

connector_state.rs (+1131 lines):
  Comprehensive migration state machine validation for
  MigratableComputation. Tests all checkpoint binding field mismatches
  (computation ID, zone, lease, mutation guards) to ensure migration
  safety invariants are enforced. Validates that suspend operations
  correctly reject checkpoints with misaligned fields.

catalog.rs (+1097 lines):
  "Truthfulness invariant suite" for CommandTruthSource and
  CommandExecutionMode enums. Includes serde round-trip tests for all
  variants, JSON encoding/decoding verification, and golden fixture
  tests to catch unintended serialization changes in command metadata
  used for logging, approvals, and transcripts.

supply_chain_cmd.rs (+542 lines):
  Unit tests for supply chain verification functions including
  camel_to_snake_case conversion, verification decision labeling,
  policy construction logic, JSON type extraction, and serde round-trip
  tests for VerifyOutput, VerifyStepOutput, VerifyPolicyOutput,
  SupplyChainReportOutput, and attestation/SBOM report structures.

cual_integration.rs (new file, integration tests):
  End-to-end CLI workflow tests for FWC operations:
  - discovery_to_template_to_validate_offline_workflow: tests search,
    schema inspection, template generation, and validation on GitHub
    issue operations
  - recipe_export_then_pipeline_validate_and_estimate_workflow: tests
    recipe export to TOML and pipeline validation/estimation
  - output_rendering_stays_composable_over_offline_views: tests
    Handlebars template rendering over offline data

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
